bidTemplate.description: An application to participate in or contribute to another domain

bidContributor.description: An application to contribute to a domain

bidEvaluator.description: An application to evaluate contributions to a domain

claimSchema.description: A structured framework defining the format and content of claims.

credentialSchema.description: A structured framework defining the format and content of credentials.

documentCollection.description: A container that groups multiple collaborative documents as a single linked resource (e.g., a folder or workspace).

domainCard.description: Semantic profile of a domain for research, interoperability, and AI-driven context discovery.

domainSettingsTemplate.description: A predefined set of forms used to create and update domain settings

evaluationTemplate.description: A structured framework defining the format and criteria for evaluating submissions or proposals.

image.description: An image of the item. This can be a URL or a fully described ImageObject.

imageIcon.description: A small, simplified visual representation used for navigation, buttons, or status indicators.

imageLogo.description: A distinctive graphic mark or symbol used to identify a brand, organization, or project.

imageProfile.description: A representative image displayed on domain cards to provide visual identification of the domain.

imageHeader.description: A banner or hero image displayed at the top of the domain overview page to provide visual context.

llm.description: A LLM file used for dynamically creating user facing content

oracleAuthZConfig.description: Configuration settings for oracle service authorization and access control.

observableMarkdown.description: Markdown content for Observable Framework pages and components.

observableNotebook.description: Interactive notebook content for Observable Framework.

page.description: The overview page of a domain containing the title and content.

pricingList.description: A structured list of pricing information for services, resources, or assets.

projectCredential.description: A digital certificate attesting to specific facts or achievements about a project.

proposalAction.description: A description of an action that is executed if the proposal is supported.

proposalTemplate.description: A predefined structure for creating and submitting proposals within a domain.

surveyTemplate.description: A predefined set of questions or forms used to collect data.

tags.description: Values for categorizing and identifying domains

verificationMethods.description: Methods used to authenticate or authorize interactions

verifiableCredential.description: A digital certification or qualification, issued by an authoritative body, and utilizing cryptographic proofs for verification.

webDashboard.description: Information displayed in Graphic User Interfaces of Web Client applications
